summary: Conduct a structured financial risk assessment including identification, scoring, mitigation planning, and risk register updates.

inputs.name: risk_context
inputs.description: Business context, exposure data, and current risk environment.

inputs.name: risk_appetite
inputs.description: Organization risk appetite and tolerance thresholds.

inputs.name: existing_controls
inputs.description: Documentation of existing risk controls and mitigations.

outputs.name: risk_assessment_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive risk assessment with categorized and scored risks.

outputs.name: risk_register
outputs.description: Updated risk register with new and modified entries.

outputs.name: mitigation_plan
outputs.description: Prioritized mitigation actions with owners and timelines.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Preserve risk categorization and reviewer handoff.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is financial risk assessment and not cybersecurity or legal risk.
Require risk context and appetite before any risk scoring is generated.
Mark all assessments as decision support and attach disclaimer before external sharing.
End with named human risk owner or reviewer handoff; do not claim risk acceptance.

steps.action: Identify financial risks across market, credit, liquidity, and operational categories.
Score each risk on likelihood and impact, assess residual risk after existing controls.
Verify regulatory compliance implications and required controls for identified risks.
Develop prioritized mitigation plan with owners, timelines, and residual risk targets.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read risk data, exposure metrics, and control documentation.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write the risk assessment report and register when requested.

verification.method: Check risks are categorized by type with likelihood and impact scores.
Check each high-priority risk has a linked mitigation action.
Check output includes disclaimer and named reviewer handoff.

success_criteria: The assessment identifies and categorizes risks across all relevant categories.
Each risk is scored with likelihood and impact, and residual risk is assessed.
The final output explicitly states it is decision support and requires human risk owner review.

rollback.when: If risk scoring is unsupported or controls are not assessed, revert to identification step.
